response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON for the song 'Asu no Yozora Shoukaihan', but the video uses a specific live arrangement with some lyrical variations. 2. Discarded unused lyrics from the Reference JSON. 3. Transcribed the opening dialogue and closing monologue which were not in the Reference JSON. 4. Timestamps are strictly synchronized with the vocal audio waveforms, ensuring no early cutoffs or cross-pause merging.

subtitles.original: ペカ統一は永久不滅！
subtitles.english: Peka-Unification is eternal and immortal!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: それじゃ、本当に最後の挨拶をしますよ！
subtitles.english: Then, I'll do the truly final greeting!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: 我ら！ペカ統一！
subtitles.english: We are! Peka-Unification!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, go!

subtitles.original: 兎田ぺこら！シオンちゃん大好き！ありがとうぺこら！
subtitles.english: Usada Pekora! I love you Shion-chan! Thank you Pekora!

subtitles.original: じゃ、まだ多分このあとも卒業ライブがあると思うから、頑張ってね。
subtitles.english: Well, since I think your graduation live still continues, do your best.

subtitles.original: ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you.

subtitles.original: これあとで渡すから。
subtitles.english: I'll give you this later.

subtitles.original: え？読みますあとで。ありがとうシオンちゃん。
subtitles.english: Eh? I'll read it later. Thank you Shion-chan.

subtitles.original: じゃ、シオンちゃんまたね！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Well, see you later Shion-chan! Thanks!

subtitles.original: マジかよ...
subtitles.english: Are you serious...?

subtitles.original: 気分次第です僕の 敵を選んで戦う少年
subtitles.english: Depending on my mood, I am a boy who picks out his enemies to fight

subtitles.original: 叶えたい未来もなくて 夢に描かれるのを待ってた
subtitles.english: With no future I want to fulfill, I was just waiting to be drawn into a dream

subtitles.original: そのくせ未来が怖くて 明日を嫌って過去に願って
subtitles.english: But still, the future is scary, I hate tomorrow, and wish upon the past

subtitles.original: もうどうしようもなくなって叫ぶんだ
subtitles.english: There's nothing more I can do, I scream

subtitles.original: 明日よ明日よもう来ないでよって
subtitles.english: "Tomorrow, tomorrow, don't come yet"

subtitles.original: そんな僕を置いて
subtitles.english: Leaving that kind of me behind

subtitles.original: 月は沈み陽は昇る
subtitles.english: The moon sets and the sun rises

subtitles.original: けれどその夜は違ったんだ
subtitles.english: But that night was different

subtitles.original: 君は僕の手を
subtitles.english: When you took my hand

subtitles.original: 空へ舞え世界の彼方 闇を照らす回旋
subtitles.english: Dance to the sky, beyond the world, the rotation that lights the darkness

subtitles.original: 君と僕をさあ また繋いでゆこう
subtitles.english: Let's connect you and me again

subtitles.original: 夢で終わってしまうのなら 昨日を返してなんて
subtitles.english: If it's just going to end as a dream, don't say

subtitles.original: 言わないでなんでなんて言わないから
subtitles.english: "Give me back yesterday," because I won't say "why"

subtitles.original: また明日も君とこうやって 笑わせて
subtitles.english: Make me laugh like this with you tomorrow too

subtitles.original: あれから世界は変わったって 本気で思ったって
subtitles.english: Even if I seriously thought the world had changed since then

subtitles.original: 期待した世界はどうしたって 未来は残酷で
subtitles.english: No matter what, the world I expected and the future are cruel

subtitles.original: それでもいったって きっと見ていた世界は本当に綺麗だったんだ
subtitles.english: Even so, the world I was surely looking at was truly beautiful

subtitles.original: 忘れてないさ 思いだせるようにしまってるの
subtitles.english: I haven't forgotten, I've tucked it away so I can remember

subtitles.original: 君がいてもいなくても 飛べるなんて
subtitles.english: Whether you're there or not, saying I can fly...

subtitles.original: もう一人じゃ歩くことさえ僕は
subtitles.english: I can't even walk alone anymore

subtitles.original: 支配も愛も風に吐いた幻想
subtitles.english: Domination and love are illusions spat into the wind

subtitles.original: 壊してくれって願ってもがいたって
subtitles.english: Even if I prayed "destroy them" and struggled

subtitles.original: 願ったんなら叶えてしまえって
subtitles.english: If I wished for it, then make it come true

subtitles.original: 君はいて
subtitles.english: You are here

subtitles.original: またさああの夜に 会いにゆこうともがいてた
subtitles.english: I wonder if you, who were struggling

subtitles.original: 君はいないかな それでも今まで僕のことだから
subtitles.english: to go meet that night again, are gone? Even so, it's just like me

subtitles.original: お別れ嫌いよ 笑ってよ
subtitles.english: I hate goodbyes, so please laugh

subtitles.original: 未来ももっと君といたいから
subtitles.english: Because I want to be with you more in the future

subtitles.original: 叫ぼう今日の日をいつか思い出す 未来の僕ら
subtitles.english: Let's shout, our future selves will remember today one day

subtitles.original: はい、ということでね。いやー、次のゲストなんですが、
subtitles.english: Alright, so... well, as for the next guest,

subtitles.original: ちょっとハードルが高そうなんだよね。
subtitles.english: the hurdle seems a bit high.

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ名高い魔導書には、
subtitles.english: In a very famous magic book,

subtitles.original: 召喚される人が喜ぶものを捧げると成功するって書いてあったんだけど...
subtitles.english: it said that if you offer something that the person being summoned likes, it will succeed...

subtitles.original: やるしかない。磨いとこ。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: I just have to do it. Better polish it. Heave-ho.

subtitles.original: 磨いて磨いて...よし。
subtitles.english: Polish, polish... alright.

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: There!
